manifest.author: iamzainnnn
manifest.changelog:
V35.2 — Hotfix

🛠 Fixed

- Fixed an issue where video effects and filters were not being applied properly in Stories.
- Fixed a blank screen issue that could occur after uploading a Story.
- Fixed incorrect corner rounding on Reels shared to Stories.
- Fixed follow status synchronization issues.
- Applied additional memory leak, media rendering, and stability fixes for improved reliability.

🔄 Improved

- Improved Story sticker responsiveness and motion prediction.
- Improved search suggestions and typeahead responsiveness.
- Refined Homecoming behavior after navigating through Reels.
- Improved audio processing for smoother playback and media handling.
- Improved Story profile bubble interactions with a larger tap area.
- Enhanced Story reshare compatibility with Spotify content.
manifest.name: Zain's Backup
manifest.description: This backup maked for the newest features!
